ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( $RecordType.Id ='01220000000MDhj' , $RecordType.Id ='01220000000MF3Y' , $RecordType.Id ='01220000000MFwy' , $RecordType.Id ='01220000000MG1A' ), ISBLANK(Detail_ActionPlan__c), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Closed with action plan') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This field is mandatory. Please provide the detail of the action plan agreed with the client.
